title: endlichera umbellata
intro: Endlichera umbellata, also known as the Philippine tree, is a species of tree in the family Rutaceae, native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Endlichera umbellata include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
